title: Amtech K0100 5 Piece Combination Spanner Set
features: DURABLE: This 5 piece combination spanner set is made from strong, drop forged, chrome plated steel
STORAGE RACK: The set includes spanners in sizes: 8, 10, 13, 14 and 17mm and comes in a handy storage rack
ERGONOMIC USE: Built for comfort and ease of handling during long sessions
COMPACT FORMAT: Conveniently sized for storage in toolboxes and cabinets
TRADE READY: Suitable for both home users and professional tradespeople
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 5x Combination Spanner See more
